signals.headline: Goldman Sachs Submits Bitcoin ETF Filing | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Goldman Sachs Submits Bitcoin ETF Filing | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Goldman Sachs has filed for a Bitcoin-focused ETF using options strategies on spot Bitcoin ETFs, confirmed in a market update on April 16, 2026, representing major institutional adoption that could drive Bitcoin prices and shift prediction markets on ETF approvals or inflows.[1]

signals.raw:

signals.headline: Kraken Announces IPO Plans | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Kraken Announces IPO Plans | YES | MED confidence**  
Kraken's IPO preparations were highlighted in the same April 16 update amid rising crypto prices, including Ethereum up to $2,404 (from $2,376 on April 15), signaling exchange growth and liquidity boosts relevant to prediction markets on listings or regulatory progress.[1]
